query:
SET @lesson1_id = (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId = (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND lessonOrder = 1 LIMIT 1);

INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(@lesson1_id, 'How many books are in the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '39', 1),
(@lesson1_id, 'Which of the following is NOT one of the four main sections of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'Apocrypha', 2),
(@lesson1_id, 'Over what time period was the Old Testament primarily written?', 'multiple_choice', 'Approximately 1,000 years (12th-2nd centuries BCE)', 3),
(@lesson1_id, 'What is the central theme of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s covenant relationship with Israel', 4),
(@lesson1_id, 'In what language was the Old Testament primarily composed?', 'multiple_choice', 'Hebrew', 5),
(@lesson1_id, 'Which book begins the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'Genesis', 6),
(@lesson1_id, 'What does the Old Testament provide for understanding the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'Historical, cultural, and theological context', 7),
(@lesson1_id, 'Which of the following is a major theme of the Old Testament?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s faithfulness and redemption', 8),
(@lesson1_id, 'How many books are in the Prophetic Books section?', 'multiple_choice', '17', 9),
(@lesson1_id, 'What does the Old Testament chronicle?', 'multiple_choice', 'God\'s relationship with humanity from creation through Israel\'s restoration', 10),
(@lesson1_id, 'Explain how the Old Testament serves as a foundation for Christian faith and theology.', 'short_answer', '', 11);
